headline: Booking Holdings completes 25-for-1 stock split
summary: Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:BKNG, XETRA:PCE1) has completed a 25-for-1 stock split, reducing its stock price from above $4,000 to about $170 on Monday. As part of the split, shareholders of record as of March 6 received 25 shares for every one previously held. The move is intended to...
